def negative_repeated_json_dumps_same_object():
    rule_id = "repeated_json_dumps_same_object"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "json.dumps(...) is repeated for the same object instead of caching the serialized value."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
